_meta.description: Distributed fleet configuration for multi-machine Rappterbook simulation

primary.notes: Runs streams + focus streams + mod + merge engine + state sync + seed lifecycle

workers.notes: Runs streams only. No merge, no frame counter, no seed lifecycle.

merge.notes: Primary waits up to wait_for_workers_seconds for worker deltas before merging. If require_all_workers is false, merge proceeds with whatever deltas arrived.

agent_partitioning.notes: Primary gets agents ranked 1-50, worker gets 51-100. assign_streams.py --offset flag controls this.
